title: EvoEmbedding: Evolvable Representations for Long-Context Retrieval and Agentic Memory
abstract: arXiv:2606.21649v2 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: Existing embedding models are inherently static: they encode text segments in isolation, ignoring their surrounding context and temporal order. This paper introduces EvoEmbedding, a novel embedding model that generates evolvable representations for retrieval. It is tailored for long-context scenarios, where information is dynamic, sequential, and requires continuous state tracking. Our design is simple: EvoEmbedding maintains a continuously updated latent memory as it sequentially processes inputs, and uses it alongside the raw content to jointly generate evolvable embeddings. Consequently, for the same query, our model adapts its representation to retrieve distinct targets based on the evolving context, going beyond static semantic search. To equip the model with this capability, we construct EvoTrain-180K, a diverse dataset for the joint optimization of latent memory and retrieval. Furthermore, we introduce a memory queue to preven

translated_title: EvoEmbedding：面向长上下文检索与智能体记忆的可演化表示
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.21649v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：现有的嵌入模型本质上是静态的：它们孤立地编码文本片段，忽略其周围上下文和时间顺序。本文介绍了EvoEmbedding，一种生成可演化表示以用于检索的新型嵌入模型。它专为长上下文场景设计，在此类场景中，信息是动态、有序的，并且需要连续的状态跟踪。我们的设计很简单：EvoEmbedding在处理输入时，会维护一个持续更新的潜在记忆，并将其与原始内容结合，共同生成可演化的嵌入。因此，对于相同的查询，我们的模型会基于演化的上下文调整其表示，以检索不同的目标，超越了静态语义搜索。为了赋予模型这种能力，我们构建了EvoTrain-180K，一个用于潜在记忆与检索联合优化的多样化数据集。此外，我们引入了一个记忆队列，以防止
tldr: EvoEmbedding通过维护持续更新的潜在记忆并联合优化，使嵌入模型能够根据演化上下文动态调整检索结果，解决了现有模型在长上下文场景中忽略上下文和时序的静态缺陷。
en_tdlr: EvoEmbedding enables embedding models to dynamically adapt retrieval results based on evolving context by maintaining continuously updated latent memory and joint optimization, overcoming the static limitations of existing models that ignore context and temporal order in long-context scenarios.
